objective: Create the canonical end-to-end Event Storming record for the task execution flow from user intent and Command through required approval to the observable Execution result.
invariants: The flow names every actor, Command, past-tense Domain Event, Policy, and Hotspot from intent through result.
Orchestration ownership and every cross-context Published Language interaction are explicit.
Ownership conflicts are recorded as Hotspots with evidence and a proposed resolution path.
The canonical Event Storming record is owned by the main checkout under my-docs/okf/event-storming.
decisions: Domain-facing child issue titles use the Domain Discovery work kind; tracer bullet remains a delivery pattern only.
Issue #12 is the only selected dependency-frontier issue in this spec worktree.
Product-owner review is required after the issue #12 Event Storming record is drafted and before the issue can become Done.
implementation_state: Issue #12 is selected and its feature branch is active. Domain Discovery has not begun. Commit 95e8d30 on the spec branch repaired sparse-worktree baseline validation and worktree-local pnpm configuration before feature start.
